ocr_reason: slide contains code snippets and multi-column text

blocks.text:
lets any coding agent
• search models,
• manage datasets,
• launch Spaces
• run jobs (and more!)

# Add CLI skill globally
hf skills add --claude --global

# Or per-project
hf skills add --claude

# Works with other agents too
hf skills add --codex
hf skills add --cursor
hf skills add --opencode
